ModMetaData.name: Leeani Playable Race
ModMetaData.author: MikeRobe
ModMetaData.description:
A nice happy race of people-foxes. Now uses Biotech xenotypes instead of Humanoid Alien Races! Built-in support for EPOE.
Adds Faction, starting Scenario, playable Xenotype, and some signature stuff.
Plenty of backstories, as well as names. Suggestions? Find @MikeRobe on the Rimworld Discord.
Note: This version requires the Biotech DLC and is incompatible with the old Humanoid Alien Races versions.
